2202850.name: Boulder Escape
2202850.description:
Run for your life in Boulder Escape!
A massive, unstoppable boulder is crashing through everything in its path, and you're the only thing standing between survival and certain doom.

Boulder Escape is a fast-paced endless runner where every second counts. Gather vital resources as you sprint through vibrant, ever-changing environments. Use what you collect to build defenses, place obstacles, and upgrade your abilities. Dodge deadly traps, outmaneuver enemies, and uncover hidden passages and secrets that might just give you the edge you need to survive.

With each run, you'll unlock powerful upgrades, discover new routes, and encounter new enemies! How long can you outrun the boulder?
2202850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
